data.title: Lao principal's dream connects two schools in China and Laos on International Day of the Deaf.
data.description: On September 28, 2025, as the global community observes the 68th International Day of the Deaf, a touching narrative will be showcased across various platforms. This story revolves around two schools located in different countries but joined by a common sign language. It highlights the unique bond between these educational institutions and emphasizes the importance of fostering connections among individuals with hearing impairments.

data.title: RaySearch unveils cutting-edge innovations at ASTRO 2025 in San Francisco, Sept 28-30, under Coding Energy to End Cancer campaign.
data.description: A company called RaySearch Laboratories AB (publ) based in Stockholm shared news about their involvement in the ASTRO event taking place in San Francisco, California from September 28 to 30, 2025. The company will showcase cutting-edge technologies as part of the global initiative "Coding Energy to End Cancer." The event attendees will have the opportunity to witness these innovations firsthand.
CHINA ISSUES PLAN ON USE OF AI IN TRANSPORT SECTOR

data.title: Xinjiang celebrates 70th anniversary with a special bilingual micro-documentary series.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, a special bilingual micro-documentary series titled "Xinjiang: The Place I Call Home" was launched to commemorate the 70th anniversary of the establishment of the Xinjiang Uygur Autonomous Region. The series aims to provide insight into the region's culture and lifestyle. Viewers are invited to follow the camera as it captures the essence of Xinjiang.

data.title: Fangzhou's 'XingShi' LLM gained spotlight in Nature News & Xinhua for AI innovation in chronic disease care.
data.description: In recent updates, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has risen by 2% compared to last quarter, now standing at 6.7%. This increase has impacted approximately 1.4 million individuals who are currently seeking employment. Along with this, the stock market experienced a decrease of 500 points, with a notable decline in the tech sector. Additionally, the GDP growth has slowed down to 3.2% from the previous quarter's 4.5%. These economic indicators highlight the challenges faced by the country in the current financial climate.

data.title: Potential impact of a $1 million Bitcoin: major disruption in finance, wealth distribution, inflation, energy markets & fiat currencies.
data.description: The rise of a Bitcoin valued at $1 million could potentially disrupt global finance by impacting wealth distribution, inflation rates, energy markets, and the significance of fiat currencies.

data.title: XRP price falls 3.6% to $2.75, testing key support at Bollinger Band levels. Technicals signal oversold conditions.
data.description: The cryptocurrency XRP is currently trading at $2.75, reflecting a 3.6% decrease. The technical analysis indicates that the asset is experiencing oversold conditions, particularly in proximity to crucial Bollinger Band support at the same price point.
EXXON DOUBLES LONDON ENERGY TRADING OPERATION WITH HIRING SPREE

data.title: Despite record surge of $2.5B in contract holdings, BNB price drops 4.7% to $945.24 from all-time high, backed by strong institutional support.
data.description: Following a recent retreat from its record peak, BNB is currently trading at $945.24. Despite the temporary dip, the cryptocurrency remains well-supported by institutional investors, with a significant $2.5 billion in contract holdings. This demonstrates substantial backing from institutional players despite the short-term market weakness.

data.title: xAI, owned by Elon Musk, sues OpenAI for alleged theft of trade secrets, claiming a "coordinated campaign" to steal xAI's source code.
data.description: According to reports, a lawsuit has been filed claiming that OpenAI organized a "coordinated campaign" to unlawfully obtain xAI's source code and confidential data related to data centers. The legal action alleges that OpenAI engaged in activities to steal important information from xAI. The specific number of stolen code or data has not been disclosed in the report.

data.title: Franklin Templeton broadens Benji Platform to BNB Chain, advancing tokenized finance with real assets on blockchain.
data.description: Franklin Templeton has recently integrated its Benji Technology Platform with BNB Chain in a bid to transform tokenized finance. This strategic move aims to scale real-world assets on the blockchain, signifying a significant advancement in the sector. This integration holds promise in revolutionizing traditional finance systems by leveraging blockchain technology. The collaboration between Franklin Templeton and BNB Chain is poised to bring about increased efficiency and transparency in financial transactions. This development underscores the growing trend of merging financial services with blockchain technology, with the potential to reshape the industry.

data.title: ETH price declines to $3,946 with technical indicators showing mixed signals. Institutional ETF flows remain robust while key support at $3,815 is crucial for traders.
data.description: The price of Ethereum has decreased by 1.53% to $3,946 due to bearish market trends, although there is continued robust flow of institutional ETF investments. ETH traders are closely monitoring the key support level at $3,815 as a critical point.

data.title: Voltage Energy Group debuts IBEX PLUS & LYNX wiring solutions at RE+ 2025 in Las Vegas, filling critical capacity gaps.
data.description: In Las Vegas on September 26, 2025, Voltage Energy Group introduced its latest pre-assembled wiring system, IBEX PLUS, and the new LYNX at RE+ 2025. These innovative plug-and-play solutions address key capacity needs and streamline installation processes.
